---
title: "Recollections of Colonel de Gonneville.  Published by his daughter, the Countess de Mirabeau. Edited, from the French, by Charlotte M. Yonge"
---

## Recollections of Colonel de Gonneville.  Published by his daughter, the Countess de Mirabeau. Edited, from the French, by Charlotte M. Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1875
**Genre:** Edited translation
**Format:** Edited book

**Publisher:** London : Hurst and Blackett 13 Great Marlborough Street.

### Notes

Probably translated by Julian Bargus Yonge.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
